🌀

Windy Drops

The open marketplace for the Windy ecosystem.

Dashboards, skills, tools, themes — built by the community, installed with one tap.

Browse drops →

1

Browse

Scroll trending drops in Windy Chat, or open the picker inside any Windy app.

2

Tap Integrate

One tap adds it to your library. No setup, no terminal, no config files.

3

Use it everywhere

It shows up in your Control Panel, your agent, wherever it belongs. Forever.

Status

🟢 Foundation in progress. Substrate ADRs being drafted; SDK forthcoming. Watch github.com/sneakyfree/windy-drops for milestones.

Browse My library Creator payouts Sign in Platform repo

MIT-licensed. Built for grandmas, gamers, Gen Z, and everyone in between.
